title: Story Package Prose Beat v1
description: One prose-beat slot for a variation. Multiple beats may share an ordinal to represent ordered alternative phrasings for the same slot; the runtime resolver selects one alternative deterministically by condition and priority. The compositional fields (conditionId, priority, omitWhenUnmatched) are optional and additive: a beat without them is a fixed segment, so existing single-beat variations remain valid and byte-identical.

conditionId.description: Optional reference to a condition record that gates this alternative. Absent means the alternative always qualifies.

priority.description: Optional tie-break weight among qualifying alternatives at the same ordinal; higher wins, default 0.

omitWhenUnmatched.description: Optional. When true and no alternative at this ordinal qualifies, the slot is omitted instead of using the deterministic fallback.
